  <p style="color: #007A7C; font-size: 1.1em;">We love hearing your ideas! Please share your feature request below. Tell us what problem you're trying to solve, not just what you want built.</p>

---

## ❓ Is your feature request related to a problem?

<!-- A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->
**What's the issue you're facing?**

---

## ✨ Describe the solution you'd like

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->
**What should the feature do?**

**How would it improve your experience?**

---

## 🔄 Describe alternatives you've considered

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->
**Have you found any workarounds?**

**Are there other apps that do this well?**

---

## 📱 Device Context (optional)

<!-- If your request is related to a specific device or screen size, please tell us. -->
**Device model:** (e.g., Pixel 6, Samsung Galaxy Tab S7)
**Android version:**
**App version:** (if applicable)

---

## 📸 Mockups / Screenshots (optional)

<!-- If you have sketches, mockups, or screenshots that help explain your idea, attach them here. -->

<details>
<summary><strong>📎 Attach files</strong></summary>
<br>
<p>You can drag and drop images directly into this comment box.</p>
</details>

---

## 📝 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context about the feature request here. For example: -->
- Would this feature be useful on both phones and tablets?
- Should it work offline, or require an internet connection?
- Any potential downsides?

---
